style.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (129 BPM) F# major track blending warm synth pads and soft guitar hums with a driving yet restrained 808 bassline that creates an intimate club atmosphere where the energy dips gracefully for vocal intimacy before rising again.

sections.text:
We’re in love with the party
Party after midnight
Smooth like the chords
And the low lights
808 heartbeat
Keeping our souls right
We don’t wanna leave
We just wanna live the nightlife
We’re in love with the party
Bodies in the same wave
Calm, but the groove
Still feels like a heatwave
Every little moment
That the DJ plays
Got us falling deeper
In the late-night haze
Drums fade out
But we still keep swaying
Low lights glow
While the guitar’s still playing
Soft lead hums
Like a secret we’re saving
Heartbeats sync
With the night we’re craving
When the snare cuts
I can hear your whisper
Promise that you’ll stay
Till the dawn gets crisper
Even when it’s quiet
We still feel lifted
Party in our souls
That’s a lifelong ticket
We’re in love with the party
Party after midnight
Smooth like the chords
And the low lights
808 heartbeat
Keeping our souls right
We don’t wanna leave
We just wanna live the nightlife
We’re in love with the party
Bodies in the same wave
Calm, but the groove
Still feels like a heatwave
Every little moment
That the DJ plays
Got us falling deeper
In the late-night haze
Drums come back for a second
Then they slide away
Vinyl crackle holds the memory
Of this perfect day
Last chord rings
While we walk in the city light
Still in love with the party
Carry it into the night
Yeah
